positive: A maximalist, intricate botanical illustration depicting a fantasy jungle canopy. The central focus is a stylized arrangement of oversized tropical leaves, rare luminous flora, and exotic patterned vines, designed to curve around a central point. Utilize deep emerald greens, vibrant sapphire blues, molten gold accents, and creamy ivory highlights. The style should emulate highly detailed Japanese woodblock print meets Art Nouveau stained glass; hyper-detailed lines, clean silhouettes, and striking contrast are paramount. Composition must be circular and balanced, suitable for a print repeat or centered apparel placement. Clean, solid colors, no gradients. Vector art aesthetic, high contrast, perfect symmetry.
negative: blurry, low detail, text, watermark, signature, logo, gradient, noise, extra limbs, bad anatomy, messy, sketch, photo, realistic, cartoon
